content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	generator client {2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"3	}4	5	datasource db {6	  provider = "postgresql"7	  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  role          Role      @default(CUSTOMER)16	  orders        Order[]17	  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())18	  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt19	}20	21	enum Role {22	  CUSTOMER23	  RESTAURANT_OWNER24	  ADMIN25	}26	27	model Restaurant {28	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())29	  name        String30	  description String?31	  address     String32	  ownerId     String33	  menuItems   MenuItem[]34	  orders      Order[]35	  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())36	  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt37	}38	39	model MenuItem {40	  id           String     @id @default(cuid())41	  name         String42	  description  String?43	  price        Float44	  restaurantId String45	  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])46	  orderItems   OrderItem[]47	  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())48	  updatedAt    DateTime   @updatedAt49	}50	51	model Order {52	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())53	  userId       String54	  user         User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])55	  restaurantId String56	  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])57	  items        OrderItem[]58	  total        Float59	  status       OrderStatus @default(PENDING)60	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())61	  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt62	}63	64	enum OrderStatus {65	  PENDING66	  PREPARING67	  READY68	  DELIVERED69	  CANCELLED70	}71	72	model OrderItem {73	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())74	  orderId    String75	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])76	  menuItemId String77	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])78	  quantity   Int79	  price      Float80	}
